core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Change behavior to silently add a port to the reserved list if reservation fails, instead of throwing a RuntimeException.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Commented out 'throw new RuntimeException(...)' and added 'reserved.add(Integer.parseInt(property)); return;'

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct a bug where the loop iterated over the original class instead of the current class in the hierarchy traversal.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Changed 'clazz.getDeclaredFields()' to 'current.getDeclaredFields()' inside the do-while loop.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the generic Spring RestTemplate bean with a specific OpenAPI-generated PetApi client to align with the new API integration strategy.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RestTemplateBuilder bean definition and added PetApi bean using ApiClient.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Introduce a configurable base URL for the API client via Spring's @Value annotation to allow runtime configuration of the service endpoint.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added @Value("${my.url}") private String myUrl; and used it to set ApiClient base path.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add SLF4J logging to the configuration class to trace the initialization of the API client with the configured URL.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added Logger field and logger.info call inside the client() bean method.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction.
Remove boilerplate code for constructing RequestEntity and handling ResponseEntity manually.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RequestEntity.post(...), restTemplate.exchange(...), and status code checks.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Change method signature to throw the specific ApiException from the generated client instead of generic Exception.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: public Pet addPet(String name) throws ApiException

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove the @Value injection for the URL since the generated client handles configuration.
Update imports to use the generated client classes and remove unused Spring Web client imports.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Explicitly define the base path for the mocked endpoint to ensure correct routing in the test context.
Switch from verbose ArgumentMatchers to static imports for cleaner Mockito stubbing syntax.
Correct the assertion in the error handling test to verify that the service throws an exception rather than returning null.
Add new test cases to verify successful pet creation scenarios with proper response validation.
Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to ensure correct URL matching in the test context.
Wrap service call in try-catch to handle ApiException thrown by the client when the server returns an error status.
Adjust import statements to reflect changes in package structure or generated code locations.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Jetty 12 package structure for WebAppContext.
Update the Configuration array type to use the new Jetty 12 package namespace.
Update imports to use the Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure instead of the legacy EE9 packages.
Add explicit super constructor call with a Builder instance to satisfy Jetty 12 API changes for AbstractConfiguration.
Update imports and type casting to use the new Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure and ServletContextApi interface.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.human_impl: Changed imports from org.eclipse.jetty.servlet to org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.servlet and cast getServletContext() to ServletContextApi.

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Implement AutoCloseable interface to ensure the embedded server is destroyed when the extension lifecycle ends.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: class MockitoEndpointExtension implements ..., AutoCloseable { ... public void close() { server.destroy(); } }

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Register the extension instance in the global JUnit 5 store to allow access across different test contexts or nested suites.
Add a static flag to ensure the global registration logic only executes once, preventing overwrites in nested test hierarchies.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: private static boolean started = false; if (!started) { started = true; ... }

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
